$comment: Placeholder rehab protocols. Real protocols come from the user's clinician via the onboarding slice and are stored in data/rehab-protocols.json (which overrides these by id). The engine looks up by `id`; if the user's data has a matching id, that wins.

protocols.notes: Default knee battery: hip and glute activation, controlled isometrics, gentle quad loading. Replace with clinician-prescribed protocol when available.

exercises.name: Glute bridge
exercises.cue: Heels close, ribs down, squeeze glutes at the top.

exercises.name: Wall sit
exercises.cue: Thighs parallel, hold the breath calm.

exercises.name: Terminal knee extension
exercises.cue: Band behind the knee, lock the knee straight, slow return.

exercises.name: Banded clam
exercises.cue: Side-lying, knees apart against the band, no hip roll.

protocols.notes: Default shoulder battery: scapular control, rotator-cuff activation, postural cues. Replace with clinician-prescribed protocol when available.

exercises.name: Scapular pull-up
exercises.cue: Dead hang, depress and retract the scapulae only — no elbow bend.

exercises.name: Band external rotation
exercises.cue: Elbow tucked to ribs, rotate slowly, control the return.

exercises.name: Wall slide
exercises.cue: Forearms on the wall, slide up keeping contact throughout.

exercises.name: Prone Y-T-W
exercises.cue: Thumbs up, lift from the mid-back, hold each rep briefly.

protocols.notes: Default lower-back battery: McGill-style anti-extension and anti-rotation, hip mobility. Replace with clinician-prescribed protocol when available.

exercises.name: Dead bug
exercises.cue: Low back glued to the floor, slow opposite limbs.

exercises.name: Bird dog
exercises.cue: Reach long, hips square, no rotation.

exercises.name: Side plank
exercises.cue: Hips stacked, top hip high, breathe.

exercises.name: Cat-cow
exercises.cue: Slow, paired with the breath — segment by segment.

exercises.name: 90/90 hip switch
exercises.cue: Sit tall, rotate the hips side to side, both knees stay grounded.
